frontmatter.title: Burger Builder
frontmatter.technologies: ReactJS (with Router, Redux and axios), JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3

node.html:
A burger builder app i made during a course React - The Complete Guide (Maximillian Schwarzmuller, udemy.com). Started with a simple app, over time built into an advanced webapp. Features authentication, Redux for global state keeping, axios for storing data in database.
